---
title: "MetaboFlow Analysis Report"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(jsonlite)
data <- fromJSON("report_data.json")
```

## 1. Analysis Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Samples | `r data$n_samples` |
| Features | `r data$n_features` |
| Significant | `r data$n_significant` |
| Groups | `r data$groups` |

## 2. Figures

```{r charts, echo=FALSE, results='asis', fig.align='center'}
for (cf in data$chart_files) {
  chart_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(cf))
  cat(sprintf("\n### %s\n\n", chart_name))
  cat(sprintf("![%s](%s){width=90%%}\n\n", chart_name, cf))
}
```

## 3. Methods

`r data$methods_text`
